title: The Morbid Reengaged
description: Adds the Morbid Harvester into your game.
body:
This mod adds a deadly boss, Morbid Harvester, who poses a huge threat to players. (Finished port of The Morbid Reborn mod)
- The Morbid Harvester is a reaper-like creature whose sole mission is to kill every living thing in the Minecraft world. 
- For every entity hit, he regenerates 2.5 hearts. 
- If you hit him too many times without him being able to hit back, he will start blocking. While blocking, he can't take damage. If you force him to block for longer than his liking, he will do a get-back move, creating a blastwave around him, knocking back any enemies as well as healing himself back up.
- This harvester has 250 hearts and very high defense.  He can be summoned in by putting a Wither Skeleton Skull on top of two Obsidian blocks, and right-clicking it with a Nether Star.
- If you, against all odds somehow manage to kill him, you will be rewarded with a great xp yield and 1-2 (depending on if your sword has looting on it) of his +40 attack damage arms. But beware, upon his death, he explodes into a rain of deadly arrows, which not even the best enchantments can save you from!    

![Morbid Harvester](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1249ec0b278eb1d0d75a2e5be9ab28051a83bb40.jpeg)
![Skill ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae660d190164ab65a909c4acdb799c0a84c0713a.jpeg)
### Enchantments
There are currently three new enchantments added by this mod, all of which are going to be essential to beat the Morbid Harvester.
1. Light Aura
For each level of Light Aura you have on a piece of armor, damage dealt by the Morbid Harvester is decreased by 5%. Max Level: 3
1. Purity
Having Purity on any of your armor pieces will make the Morbid Harvester unable to regenerate health from hitting you. Max Level: 1
1. Harvest
Increases damage dealt to the Morbid Harvester with 20% per level. Goes on sword. Max Level: 5
